message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "EOA" as EOA
participant "AuctionFactory_01" as AuctionFactory_01

EA->AuctionFactory_01: createAuction(\n\ntype\tname\tvalue\naddress\tlogic\t0x9221b7F7AFB96adBBEE4bc6D003Cc6f598ACdEA3\nuint\ttokenAmount\t100000000000000000000\naddress\ttokenContractAddress\t0x0bc529c00C6401aEF6D220BE8C6Ea1667F6Ad93e\n){ 0.0 GWEI }
activate AuctionFactory_01
AuctionFactory_01-->>EOA: REVERT! (\nstring 'Pausable: paused'\n)
deactivate AuctionFactory_01

note right of AuctionFactory_01
  Participant details
  Alias\tContract name\tAddress
  EOA\tExternally Owned Account\t0x08e93c4BAccEBA7510d63b89E4c8496F6C8B34A4
  AuctionFactory_01\tAuctionFactory\t0xAf9798905714E8F781A06D08C5172e1Ed1620Bc0
end note

@enduml
